prompt: I have an official PDF rulebook for 'Ticket to Ride' that I want to add to our database. The PDF has English setup instructions and gameplay rules. I need to extract the content and create a structured game record with Japanese summaries. How do I do this?

assertions.name: includes-pdf-extraction-code
assertions.description: Provides working Python code using pdfplumber or PyPDF2 to extract text

assertions.name: covers-gemini-integration
assertions.description: Explains how to call Gemini for translation and structuring (using generate_metadata from prompts.yaml)

assertions.name: four-summary-fields
assertions.description: Output includes all 4 required fields: setup_summary, gameplay_summary, end_game_summary, rules_summary

assertions.name: japanese-output-confirmed
assertions.description: Explicitly states that output should be in Japanese

assertions.name: supabase-insertion
assertions.description: Shows how to validate and insert the record into Supabase using upsert
